evidences.title: Barcelona 6-1 Olympiacos (Oct 21, 2025) Game Analysis - ESPN
evidences.content: "This is last season, the past. Now it's a different situation," Flick said. "But I always think positive. Of course we are able to win in Madrid. We have a good team. Maybe two players come back. We have this huge victory today, gives us confidence for Sunday. And we will see. We have time to recover and also to prepare for the match. "Olympiacos made it really good in the beginning. They press us high, we had some problems playing out from the back." Information from The Associated Press, PA and ESPN Research was used in this report. ### Game Information ### UEFA Champions League Standings [...] "He has potential, you can see today, his dynamic, in front of goal he's so dangerous," Barcelona coach Hansi Flick said after the game. "For us, it's important we have him in our team. He's good with the ball, against the ball he's fantastic for us. He gives us the dynamic we need. And of course he scored two goals in the beginning that were very important for us." After gaining the upper hand with the extra man the Spanish champions overwhelmed Olympiacos with four goals in 11 minutes -- starting with Yamal's spot kick. Fermín López celebrates with fellow goalscorers Marcus Rashford...

evidences.title: Olympiacos F.C. - Wikipedia
evidences.content: At the international level, Olympiacos is the only Greek football club in history to have won a major European trophy by winning the UEFA Conference League in 2023–24. With their historic 2024 triumph, they became the first club outside Europe's top four leagues "Big Five (association football)") (Premier League, La Liga, Serie A, Bundesliga) to win a UEFA competition since 2011,( and the first European club ever to win two UEFA trophies in a single season, following their youth team's earlier victory in the UEFA Youth League.( They also added a 5th, larger star above their crest, representing their Conference League victory.( Olympiacos is also the highest ranked Greek club in the UEFA rankings, placing 33rd in the ten-year ranking,( and 37th in the five-year ranking as of 2025.( [...] Founded on 10 March 1925 and nicknamed _Thrylos_ (Legend), Olympiacos are the most successful club in Greek football history.( They have won 48 league titles,( 29 Cups (19 doubles) and 5 Super Cups, being the record holder for all of these competitions.( The club won its first European title in 2024 when its U-19 Team won the UEFA Youth League. They also hold oneUEFA Europa Conference League and...
